revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''4-1-670

Alternative term: Dummy antenna

A substantially non-radiating device used to simulate an antenna in respect of input impedance over some specified range of frequencies.


{{IALAFooter}}
